subcodes.first_line: My God, my God! Thou hast created a handmaiden from the essence of Thy love, and fashioned a leaf from the pure substance of Thy knowledge, and illumined her countenance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی قد خلقت امه من جوهر محبتک و برئت ورقه من ساذج معرفتک و نورت وجهها
